name: The Bad Guys RP.
description:
DISCLAIMER: THIS IS MOSTLY BASED OFF THE FIRST MOVIE PERSONALITIES AND APPERANCES

(any characters from the second movie will have no current relations with those from the first. Sorry Susan x Snake fans.)

A somewhat accurate representation of the main characters from The Bad Guys Movie and locations (Mostly used wiki, don't tell anybody 🤫)

CURRENT CHARATER LIST:

Bad Guys: Wolf, Shark, Snake, Pahrana, Webs

Diane Foxington

Misty Luggins

Tiffany Fluffit

Prof. Marmalade

The Bad Girls: Kitty Kat, Pigtail Petrova, Doom

LOCATIONS:

Greater Los Angeles

S.C.U.M

The Bad Guys' Hideout

THIS WILL PROBABLY GET UPDATED AT SOME POINT.

V1.5 added 4 new characters, The Bad Girls and Marmalade. Also, 10 hearts? Holy shit, thanks 😁

Oh cool, first page for both Bad Guys tag? Fuckin awesome 😍

50 hearts and over 500 chats? Bruh idfk how or why this got so much love but thank you for your support! 💜

Be sure to check out some of my other bots if you enjoy stuff like this!
